query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(360103, 'According to Acts 2, the outpouring of the Spirit at Pentecost fulfilled the prophecy of:', 'multiple_choice', '["Isaiah","Jeremiah","Joel","Malachi"]', 'Joel', 1),
(360103, 'In 1 Corinthians 14, Paul ranks prophecy as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Less important than tongues","More desirable than tongues for church edification","Equal to all other gifts","The least of the gifts"]', 'More desirable than tongues for church edification', 2),
(360103, 'The daughters of Philip the evangelist were known for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Teaching in the synagogue","Prophesying","Performing miracles","Writing Scripture"]', 'Prophesying', 3),
(360103, 'Agabus prophesied about:', 'multiple_choice', '["The destruction of Jerusalem","A famine and Paul''s arrest","The conversion of Gentiles","The death of Herod"]', 'A famine and Paul''s arrest', 4),
(360103, 'According to 1 Corinthians 14:29, prophecies in the church should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Accepted without question","Judged by others","Written down immediately","Kept private"]', 'Judged by others', 5),
(360103, 'The gift of prophecy in the New Testament is given for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal glory","Strengthening, encouragement, and comfort","Predicting lottery numbers","Condemning unbelievers"]', 'Strengthening, encouragement, and comfort', 6),
(360103, 'Paul instructs believers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Forbid prophesying","Eagerly desire the gift of prophecy","Only allow apostles to prophesy","Limit prophecy to men"]', 'Eagerly desire the gift of prophecy', 7),
(360103, 'New Testament prophecy differs from Old Testament prophecy in that:', 'multiple_choice', '["It is always infallible","It must be tested and evaluated","It replaces Scripture","It only predicts the future"]', 'It must be tested and evaluated', 8),
(360103, 'The book of Revelation describes itself as:', 'multiple_choice', '["A history book","A prophecy","A parable","A letter only"]', 'A prophecy', 9),
(360103, 'According to Ephesians 4:11, prophets are given to the church for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Entertainment","Equipping the saints for ministry","Political influence","Financial prosperity"]', 'Equipping the saints for ministry', 10),
(360103, 'Explain how the gift of prophecy functions in the New Testament church and its relationship to Scripture.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The gift of prophecy in the NT church serves to edify, encourage, and comfort believers. It is subordinate to Scripture, must be tested, and operates under the authority of God''s written Word.', 11);
